title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 with 2M Token Context
summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5, featuring a 2 million token context window and significantly improved reasoning capabilities across math and coding benchmarks.

title: NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPU Benchmark Results
summary: Early benchmarks show NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra delivering 3x inference throughput compared to H100, with power efficiency gains of 40%.

title: EU AI Act Enforcement Begins for High-Risk Systems
summary: The European Union began enforcing the AI Act's provisions for high-risk AI systems, requiring conformity assessments and registration.

title: Google DeepMind AlphaFold 3 Protein Design Update
summary: DeepMind released an update to AlphaFold 3 improving accuracy on multi-chain protein complex predictions by 18%.

title: Tesla Optimus Gen 3 Factory Deployment
summary: Tesla deployed 1,000 Optimus Gen 3 humanoid robots across its Fremont factory for assembly line tasks.

title: Anthropic Claude 4 Scores 92% on SWE-Bench
summary: Anthropic's Claude 4 achieved 92% on the SWE-Bench software engineering benchmark, setting a new state-of-the-art record.

title: Apple M5 Chip Announced with Neural Engine Upgrade
summary: Apple unveiled the M5 chip with a 40-core Neural Engine, targeting on-device AI inference for the upcoming MacBook Pro lineup.

title: China Releases Open Source LLM Matching GPT-4
summary: Chinese research consortium released an open source LLM with performance matching GPT-4 on standard benchmarks.
